definitions.name: Sealed Evidence Registry
definitions.summary: A cold records hall where confiscated objects are taught to become inventory numbers.

features.name: breathing evidence cabinet
features.description: Its numbered drawers inhale whenever an undocumented wonder enters the room.

features.name: confiscation index wheel
features.description: Thousands of red tabs orbit a blank category reserved for the player.

features.name: scrubbed testimony desk
features.description: Grooves in the marble show where witnesses gripped it before revising themselves.

definitions.name: Palace of Reasonable Peace
definitions.summary: White chambers turn fear into procedure before it can reach the throne.

features.name: petition weather ceiling
features.description: Clouds of rejected requests drift behind charter-glass and rain only on unauthorized visitors.

features.name: precedent throne
features.description: The seat is built from rulings rather than stone; each armrest cites the other.

features.name: merciful decree furnace
features.description: Unissued mercies burn with a clean blue flame that warms nobody.

definitions.name: Archive of Moving Responsibility
definitions.summary: File bridges and mobile cabinets follow whichever office is currently to blame.

features.name: ambulatory docket cabinet
features.description: Brass feet carry it one room away whenever its contents become relevant.

features.name: sealed contradiction table
features.description: Two true reports lie beneath glass because filing either would invalidate the room.

features.name: responsibility index
features.description: Every official name points carefully toward a different official name.

definitions.name: House of Borrowed Dryness
definitions.summary: Willow rooms shelter medicines, fugitives, and memories that cannot safely sleep together.

features.name: names-in-water hearth
features.description: A shallow warm basin repeats household names without ever boiling.

features.name: three-purpose reed cupboard
features.description: Its bundles are labeled roof, fever, and soldiers-at-the-door.

features.name: red-thread guest bed
features.description: One loose knot decides whether the sleeper is guest, kin, or hidden.

definitions.name: Afterlight Conservatory
definitions.summary: Blue crystal chambers store finished songs beside daylight not yet spent.

features.name: evening light organ
features.description: Crystal pipes play colors the sun forgot to use.

features.name: patient fracture plinth
features.description: A cracked royal crystal is being allowed to finish becoming something else.

features.name: snow-listening gallery
features.description: Open facets translate avalanche pressure into a low choral warning.

definitions.name: Hall of Many Correct Witnesses
definitions.summary: Whalebone rafters preserve every improved version of Brall's favorite disasters.

features.name: contradictory hero frieze
features.description: Each carved rescuer points discreetly at a different drowning person.

features.name: storm-story cask
features.description: Ale inside tastes stronger whenever thunder supplies punctuation.

features.name: witness improving bench
features.description: Seat-worn bone encourages the body toward confident exaggeration.

definitions.name: Court of the Unfinished Finish
definitions.summary: Copper rings and preserved wheel marks arbitrate races whose endings remain mobile.

features.name: yesterday wheel impression
features.description: The clay holds a winning wheel that will not arrive until tomorrow.

features.name: public oath rail
features.description: Copper rings tighten around any promise stated merely for applause.

features.name: disputed finish tapestry
features.description: Dust-colored thread rearranges the leaders whenever nobody argues.

definitions.name: The Counterloom
definitions.summary: A civic loom where every pattern must survive contradiction before becoming cloth.

features.name: rebuttal shuttle
features.description: It refuses any thread whose color cannot defend itself.

features.name: minority-pattern frame
features.description: The losing design is preserved here until fashion admits its mistake.

features.name: tariff-gray dye sink
features.description: Official gray separates into seven prohibited colors when washed.

definitions.name: Civic Letterhouse
definitions.summary: Engineers and scribes design letters capable of surviving water, law, and public use.

features.name: unapproved alphabet wall
features.description: One letter repeatedly escapes its chalk box to modify nearby notices.

features.name: canal-pressure writing desk
features.description: Water beneath the tabletop powers a pen that never lifts.

features.name: drowned portfolio rack
features.description: Pages drip upward toward the ceiling and remain perfectly legible.

definitions.name: Mare-Dream House
definitions.summary: An open-roofed stable where people wait quietly for horses to explain the roads they dreamed.

features.name: unridden dream saddle
features.description: Tooling maps a road no waking rider has found.

features.name: east-wind manger
features.description: Empty wood smells of the pasture currently speaking through it.

features.name: foal-forgiveness rail
features.description: Braided grass loosens when a frightened animal chooses trust.

definitions.name: Guesthouse of the Present Dead
definitions.summary: One large hearth seats living guests among ancestors with strong procedural opinions.

features.name: absent-cousin chair
features.description: The empty chair interrupts whenever kinship is described too simply.

features.name: many-coal hearth
features.description: Each ember belongs to a clan; sparks favor families currently outside.

features.name: genealogy guest rope
features.description: New knots appear when hospitality changes a family more than blood did.

definitions.name: Vault of Geographically Responsible Curses
definitions.summary: Black ropes connect grudges, cliffs, and households so each curse can be returned accurately.

features.name: grievance map
features.description: Black cords measure injury rather than distance and cross walls freely.

features.name: misaddressed curse jar
features.description: Something inside keeps apologizing to the wrong family.

features.name: seventh-warning shelf
features.description: The empty shelf casts the shadow of a warning nobody admits removing.

definitions.name: House of the Third Water
definitions.summary: A cool sandstone chamber listens to three wells, only two of which contain water.

features.name: unborn-name cistern
features.description: Its echo answers with a traveler's name several years too early.

features.name: folded noon awning
features.description: A square of late afternoon waits beneath blue cloth.

features.name: caravan thirst ledger
features.description: Water debts are recorded beside the roads that caused them.

definitions.name: Exchange Below Low Tide
definitions.summary: A shell-vaulted market opens between tides to trade cargo, songs, and drowned testimony.

features.name: returning-water contract table
features.description: Every agreement shortens as seawater climbs its legs.

features.name: drowned voice cabinet
features.description: Shell drawers preserve testimony in the speaker's exact saltwater voice.

features.name: channel-score basin
features.description: Ripples rewrite the safe harbor melody minute by minute.

definitions.name: The Tent After the Festival
definitions.summary: A jewel-bright pavilion is larger than the district outside and remembers guests who have not arrived.

features.name: dance of absent feet
features.description: Footprints circle the floor and make room for the player.

features.name: tomorrow mask rack
features.description: Each mask resembles whoever will wear it next, badly frightened.

features.name: inside-out flower chandelier
features.description: Roots drink ceiling rain while blossoms illuminate the soil below.
